examples: It is suggested that 5,000-6,000 years ago people in the Middle East and North Africa started to allot specific lengths of time to tasks.
Allot regular funding to most departments.
Enquiries are so large that we can only than allot you 200 cases.
You could allot a half hour a day, say, to answering urgent emails and calls.
Allot about five days for this large area, starting in the romantic colonial city of Arequipa.
